events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missing weld per drawing on a commercial structural welding project governed by AWS D1.1. The work is at rough-complete stage. A missing weld is non-compliant with the drawing/detail and AWS D1.1 requirements. This is a fail.
